nasb.text: Therefore the Jews were grumbling about Him, because He said, “I am the bread that came down out of heaven.”

esv.text: So the Jews grumbled about him, because he said, “I am the bread that came down from heaven.”

cnv.text: 猶太人因為耶穌說“我是從天上降下來的食物”，就紛紛議論他。

ccb.text: 犹太人听见耶稣说自己是从天上降下来的粮，就小声议论，

csbs.text: 这时候，一些犹太人因为耶稣说‘我是从天上降下来的粮’，就私下议论他，
